title: Add Claude Code recursive hammer-test prompt
description: Add a versioned Claude Code prompt and docs for recursively hammer-testing exa-cli through real operator and agent workflows, then tightening the product based on findings.

title: Tear down exa-cli operator UX and refresh portal
Refine terminal portal art for exa-cli
Automate signed release artifacts and Homebrew publishing
description: Add release automation for versioned binaries, checksums, and Homebrew distribution so exa-cli has one consistent install story.

title: Strengthen testing harness and operator docs
description: Expand exa-cli automated coverage around rendering, research flows, and failure paths; add a battle-test harness that exercises the built binary in operator and agent workflows; and refresh documentation so testing instructions and current command behavior are clear, crisp, and kept in sync.

title: Add snapshot tests for generated reference docs
description: Lock docs/reference generation to the live command tree with snapshot verification in CI.

title: Harden pure-command flag parsing on lightweight runtime path
description: Ensure pure commands like version and the root home screen validate and honor inherited persistent flags consistently even when heavy config/cache initialization is skipped.

title: Add live smoke coverage for research create/cancel
description: Extend the live Exa verification surface to cover research create/cancel flows in a spend-aware way, either through the live Go suite, the battle-test harness, or both.

title: Add terminal-safe device-flow auth
description: Implement a real device-flow login path for exa-cli auth login so the CLI can support browser-optional auth without requiring users to paste API keys manually.

title: Add dedicated company and people commands
description: Promote Exa category-aware search into dedicated top-level commands with client-side filter validation and tuned renderers.
